title: Roasted Robata Greek Beets Dolmades
description: Briny, crisp, and savory, these dolmades are a perfect date-night dish for any occasion. The combination of roasted beets, kombu, and lemon is a game-changer.
instructions: Wrap each beet slice in a grape leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Place the dolmades on a robata grill and roast at 400�30C for 15 minutes.
After 15 minutes, brush the dolmades with a mixture of 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 2 cloves of minced garlic, and 1 tablespoon of fresh lemon zest.
Continue roasting for an additional 5 minutes, or until the grape leaves are crispy and the beets are tender.
